key_models.product.template: Product template. Fields: name, type (consu/product/service), categ_id, uom_id, uom_po_id, tracking, route_ids, sale_ok, purchase_ok.
key_models.product.product: Product variant. Fields: product_tmpl_id, barcode, default_code, combination_indices, qty_available, virtual_available.
key_models.product.category: Product category. Fields: name, parent_id, property_cost_method, property_valuation, property_stock_account_input, property_stock_account_output.
key_models.uom.uom: Unit of measure. Fields: name, category_id, factor, uom_type, rounding.
key_models.stock.warehouse: Warehouse. Fields: name, code, company_id, lot_stock_id, view_location_id, in_type_id, out_type_id, int_type_id, pick_type_id, pack_type_id.
key_models.stock.location: Stock location. Fields: name, complete_name, usage (internal/supplier/customer/inventory/transit/etc), location_id, company_id, scrap_location.
key_models.stock.picking: Stock picking. Fields: name, picking_type_id, location_id, location_dest_id, move_ids, state, partner_id, scheduled_date, backorder_id.
key_models.stock.picking.type: Picking type. Fields: name, code (incoming/outgoing/internal), sequence_id, default_location_src_id, default_location_dest_id, warehouse_id.
key_models.stock.move: Stock move. Fields: name, product_id, product_uom_qty, quantity, product_uom, location_id, location_dest_id, picking_id, state, procurement_group_id.
key_models.stock.move.line: Stock move line. Fields: move_id, product_id, lot_id, quantity, product_uom_id, location_id, location_dest_id, state, picked.
key_models.stock.route: Route. Fields: name, active, product_selectable, product_categ_selectable, warehouse_selectable, rule_ids, sequence.
key_models.stock.rule: Procurement rule. Fields: name, route_id, action (pull/push/pull_push), location_src_id, location_dest_id, proc_method, picking_type_id.
key_models.procurement.group: Procurement group. Fields: name, move_ids, sale_id, purchase_id.
key_models.stock.warehouse.orderpoint: Reordering rule. Fields: product_id, location_id, product_min_qty, product_max_qty, qty_multiple, trigger, company_id.
key_models.stock.lot: Lot/serial number. Fields: name, product_id, company_id, expiration_date, use_date, removal_date, alert_date.
key_models.stock.quant: Stock quant. Fields: product_id, location_id, lot_id, quantity, reserved_quantity, owner_id, package_id.
key_models.stock.valuation.layer: Valuation layer. Fields: stock_move_id, product_id, quantity, unit_cost, value, account_move_id, company_id.
key_models.stock.landed.cost: Landed cost (Enterprise). Fields: vendor_bill_id, cost_lines, valuation_adjustment_lines, account_move_id, state.
key_models.stock.inventory.adjustment: Inventory adjustment (via stock.quant). Fields: product_id, location_id, inventory_quantity, quantity, inventory_diff_quantity.

key_files.stock/models/stock_warehouse.py: Warehouse, picking types, and routes setup
key_files.stock/models/stock_quant.py: Stock quants, inventory adjustments, and reservation
key_files.stock_account/models/product.py: Product valuation and cost method integration

crons.stock.ir_cron_scheduler_action: Procurement scheduler: run reordering rules and generate PO/MO.
crons.stock.ir_cron_check_product_inactivity: Detect inactive products and obsolete stock.

security_groups.stock.group_stock_user: Stock user: process pickings, inventory adjustments, lots
security_groups.stock.group_inventory_manager: Inventory manager: access to inventory reports and valuation
